name: Burger Trittini
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ground beef and onion over medium-high heat until browned.
2. Drain excess fat.
3. Add the remaining ingredients; bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, until thickened.
5. Squeeze liquid from spinach.
6. Combine with cottage cheese. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Spoon meat mixture into a 13x9 inch baking dish.
8. Sprinkle half of the mozzarella cheese on top.
9. Arrange spinach over the cheese.
10. Sprinkle remaining mozzarella on top.
11. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes, or until hot and bubbly.
